REVIEW FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT D & A BUILDERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $1721.00. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF SERVED RESPONSES TO THE DISCOVERY WHICH IS THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THIS MOTION ON DEC. 11, 2013 THUS RENDERING THIS MOTION MOOT. IF DEFENDANTS DEEMED THOSE RESPONSES TO BE INCOMPLETE OR OTHERWISE INADEQUATE SUCH OBJECTIONS WILL HAVE TO BE THE SUBJECT MATTER OF ANOTHER MOTION. THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $960.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO SERVE THESE RESPONSES IN A TIMELY MANNER PAYMENT OF WHICH SHOULD BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS OF THIS ORDER. COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY WILL SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Compel Pltff To Respond To Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $1721.00
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT D & A BUILDERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $1721.00

Appearances: Sherrie M. Flynn of Coleman & Horowitt, LLP (559.248.4820 x127) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

There being no other appearances, all other parties are deemed to have stipulated to this matter being decided by Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne. Ms. Flynn stipulates via Court Call on behalf of defendant. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: It appears that plaintiff served responses to the discovery which is the subject matter of this motion on Dec. 11, 2013 thus rendering this motion moot. If defendants deemed those responses to be incomplete or otherwise inadequate such objections will have to be the subject matter of another motion. The court will impose monetary sanctions in the amount of $960.00 against plaintiff for failure to serve these responses in a timely manner payment of which should be made within ten (10) days of this order. Counsel for moving party will submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Not reported (302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Compliance
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Richard M. Jacobson, Jacobson Markham, 916.854.5969, appearing by Court Call for the Defendant D & A Builders;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: A R G U E D; DEFENDANT D & A BUILDERS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Compliance is submitted. Motion GRANTED. The Court orders that Igor Elgart and Svetlana Elgart appear for and comply with deposition subpoenas properly served upon them. The Court DENIES the request for sanctions. Order signed. Elizabeth Riles, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
